how_can_we_help: How can we help you today?
faq_1: How do I reset my password?
faq_1_ans: You can reset your password from the security settings.
faq_2: Can I change my email address?
faq_2_ans: Yes, you can update your contact email in the 'Edit Profile' section under your Account settings.
faq_3: How to sync my glucose monitor?
faq_3_ans: Go to the monitoring section and click on 'Sync Device'.
faq_4_ans: Your data is encrypted and stored securely according to our privacy policy.
store_organize_reports: Store and organize your medical analysis results.
click_to_upload: Click to Upload PDF, JPG, PNG
scan_desc: You can scan your physical reports using your phone camera for automatic organization.
are_you_sure_delete: Are you sure you want to delete
make_sure_sensor_nearby: Make sure your glucose sensor is turned on and nearby.
ensure_bluetooth_enabled: Ensure Bluetooth is enabled in your system settings.
